g.text: 2. All heat-set insert bosses: M3 x 5mm brass knurled inserts, installed at 245C.
3. Pilot holes for inserts: 4.0mm diameter, through full tray thickness.
4. Corner through-holes: 3.4mm clearance for M3 screws (tray-to-shell mounting).
5. Pump mounting pattern estimated at 60x45mm (TBD — measure KPHM400 bracket).
6. C-clips are integral printed features with snap-in openings for strain relief.
7. Wire routing channel: U-shaped, 5mm wide x 3mm deep, runs full width along front edge.
8. Locating tabs (4x) key into mating slots on shell interior walls.
9. Dims in mm. Tolerances: +/-0.3mm general, +/-0.1mm insert pilot bores.
